As Manchester City continue to crank up the pressure on Arsenal, Pep Guardiola tells his players to take three days off to "enjoy life" with "caipirinhas and daiquiris".

items.ja: Deal with 'noise' or join another club - Arteta
items.en: Deal with 'noise' or join another club - Arteta
items.text_for_match: Deal with 'noise' or join another club - Arteta  Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his players should "be part of a different club" if they can not deal with the "noise" as his team bid to end their 22-year wait for a league title. Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his players should "be part of a different club" if they can not deal with the "noise" as his team bid to end their 22-year wait for a league title.

items.ja: Analysis: Chelsea undone by two Achilles heels
items.en: Analysis: Chelsea undone by two Achilles heels
items.text_for_match: Analysis: Chelsea undone by two Achilles heels Red cards and set-pieces are problems that existed at Chelsea long before Rosenior arrived, says Chris Wise. Red cards and set-pieces are problems that existed at Chelsea long before Rosenior arrived, says Chris Wise.

items.ja: Red cards and poor home form - Chelsea 'set fire to points'
items.en: Red cards and poor home form - Chelsea 'set fire to points'
items.text_for_match: Red cards and poor home form - Chelsea 'set fire to points' Chelsea have more red cards than any side in the Premier League this season, and boss Liam Rosenior says they have "set fire" to points. Chelsea have more red cards than any side in the Premier League this season, and boss Liam Rosenior says they have "set fire" to points.

items.ja: 'I still feel I can contribute' - Milner on breaking Premier League record
items.en: 'I still feel I can contribute' - Milner on breaking Premier League record
items.text_for_match: 'I still feel I can contribute' - Milner on breaking Premier League record James Milner reacts to breaking the record for most appearances in the Premier League. James Milner reacts to breaking the record for most appearances in the Premier League.

items.ja: Emery reflects on 'deserved draw' against Leeds
items.en: Emery reflects on 'deserved draw' against Leeds
items.text_for_match: Emery reflects on 'deserved draw' against Leeds Aston Villa manager Unai Emery remains upbeat after their draw with Leeds United, saying the result is a point gained rather than two points lost. items.ja: 'Drive and hunger' take Milner to Premier League appearance record
items.en: 'Drive and hunger' take Milner to Premier League appearance record
items.text_for_match: 'Drive and hunger' take Milner to Premier League appearance record Brighton's James Milner starts against Brentford to break the all-time Premier League appearance record in his 654th match.
